overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a first-person perspective inside a moving NCART subway train at night. The interior features distinct cyberpunk aesthetics with contrasting teal and orange neon lighting, while the train travels through dark tunnels and past illuminated station platforms. Two NPC passengers remain stationary throughout the journey—one seated wearing a hat, another standing by the doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic subway train interior with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: stationary passenger observing the subway interior and passing tunnel lights through the window

notable_agents.action: passenger wearing a wide-brimmed hat sitting on the bench seat, facing away from camera
passenger standing and holding onto the support pole near the train doors

entered.detail: brown leather bench seats with metallic frames along the left side
yellow vertical handrail pole in the aisle
illuminated route display showing NCART B line destinations and time 05:41
large rectangular window showing dark tunnel exterior with passing light streaks
poster on the train door with purple and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic subway car with distinctive cyberpunk neon aesthetics—teal ambient lighting contrasted with orange accent lights. Two NPC passengers occupy the space: one seated figure in a hat on the left, and one standing figure holding a pole on the right. The train moves steadily through dark tunnels, with occasional light fixtures streaking past the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway train passing through station areas

events.description: exterior lighting brightens significantly as train passes through a station area, illuminating the interior through the windows
train approaches station platform with visible signage and structural elements becoming clear outside the window

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride the train as it passes through brightly lit station sections

notable_agents.action: seated passenger remains stationary, occasionally shifting slightly
standing passenger maintains grip on pole as train moves

entered.detail: concrete platform with safety markings and structural columns visible through the window
large illuminated advertisement with yellow text visible briefly as train passes
red illuminated sign reading MEDITek PLAZA visible on station wall

elements.scene_description: The train continues through sections with variable exterior lighting, passing station platforms and illuminated billboards that briefly brighten the interior. The digital display maintains the route information while the two passengers remain in their positions. External structures including platform edges and corporate signage become visible through the windows as the train approaches a station stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective inside a futuristic subway car as it travels through the dark subterranean tunnels of a cyberpunk city. It begins within the neon-lit interior, where teal ambient lighting contrasts with sharp orange accents and two stationary passengers occupy the space. As the train moves steadily forward, the camera captures the rhythmic blur of light fixtures streaking past the windows against the surrounding blackness. The scene maintains this atmospheric tension, gliding through the tunnel while the interior glow reflects off the metallic surfaces of the carriage.
